themes.name: Struxa Vision
themes.description: Light SaaS marketing theme with warm off-white canvas, orange accents, two-tier header, hero illustration, and trust bar. Built for Struxa CMS storefront pages, content types, and menus.
themes.author: Struxa

plugins.name: Forum
plugins.description: Full community forum for Struxa CMS: categories, forums, threads and replies with Markdown, likes, subscriptions, tags, search and member profiles. Includes sticky and locked threads, online-now stats, rate limiting, reporting, and an admin moderation panel. Threads sync to a CMS content type for SEO metadata, slugs and featured images. Ships with a homepage latest-discussions widget.
plugins.author: Struxa

plugins.name: Struxa Catalog Admin
plugins.description: Community plugin and theme submissions, admin review, and struxa-dist catalog publishing for struxapoint.com.
plugins.author: Struxa
